chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Second Appeal No.101 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing case 1. For hearing of CMA No.3041/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 22.01.2026 None present for the appellant. ------------------------------------ None have been present on behalf of the appellant in this matter since it was filed in the year 2022. On the last date of hearing, this Court issued notice to the appellant directly by electronic modes. As per the bailiff’s report, service has been effected by whatsapp as well as by in person, however, none are present on behalf of the appellant. No intimation is received. It appears that the appellant has lost interest in pursuing this matter. Dismissed for non-prosecution. s J U D G E Asif
